ocr_findings.description: Image is a 2-column dense review layout continuing from prior page (2章 labor law / compliance / personal info / standards entries in left column; 3章 SWOT/PPM/M&A/marketing entries in right column). OCR linearizes into single-column list, losing the 2-column structure. Text content appears complete.
OCR starts mid-sentence with '労働条件の最低基準を定めた法律' — the section header '2章' may be split across the page boundary from page_558. Content is intact but context header is absent at start.

reviewer_notes: Continuation of 重要用語を総復習 covering chapters 2 (労働基準法 through デファクトスタンダード) and chapter 3 (SWOT through IPO/マーケティング). Label 'content' is correct. 2-column linearization is the main OCR limitation; no substantive text is lost. Existing label agrees.
